How much should a website cost?

Have you ever asked yourself how much a website should cost? Well here I've compiled a few questions to help you guage how much a website should cost based on research.

How many pages is your website going to need? If you don't just estimate.


Will you be using a content managment system?


How many pages is your website going to need? If you don't just estimate.


How many pages is your website going to need? If you don't just estimate.


Total:

The Amount of Pages?

The amount of pages is somehting that you're going to have to consider when your going to invest in a website.
